parameters.query:
WITH shop_data AS (
  SELECT
    el.uex_id AS item_uex_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_source_id',  tt.source_id,
        'terminal_name',       tt.name,
        'terminal_type',       tt.terminal_type,
        'terminal_code',       tt.metadata->>'code',
        'terminal_screenshot', tt.metadata->>'screenshot',
        'is_available_live',   (tt.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean,
        'location_name',       COALESCE(l.name, tt.metadata->>'outpost_name', tt.metadata->>'planet_name'),
        'location_type',       COALESCE(l.location_type, tt.metadata->>'type'),
        'system_name',         COALESCE(s.name, tt.metadata->>'star_system_name'),
        'system_code',         COALESCE(s.metadata->>'code', ''),
        'buy_price',           p.buy_price,
        'sell_price',          p.sell_price
      ) ORDER BY COALESCE(s.name, tt.metadata->>'star_system_name'),
                 COALESCE(l.name, tt.metadata->>'outpost_name'),
                 tt.name
    ) FILTER (WHERE p.id IS NOT NULL) AS sold_at
  FROM datap4k_mining_gear_norm mg
  JOIN datap4k_entity_links el ON el.id = mg.entity_link_id
  JOIN prices p ON p.item_external_id = el.uex_id AND p.asset_type = 'item'
  LEFT JOIN trade_terminals tt ON tt.source_id = concat('terminals:', p.uex_terminal_id::text)
  LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = tt.location_id
  LEFT JOIN systems s ON s.id = l.system_id
  GROUP BY el.uex_id
)
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  mg.slug,
  'mining_gear',
  mg.name,
  mg.manufacturer,
  mg.category,
  el.uex_id,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',         mg.name,
    'category',     mg.category,
    'manufacturer', mg.manufacturer,
    'size',         mg.size,
    'file',         mg.file,
    'source_slug',  mg.source_slug,
    'modifiers', jsonb_build_object(
      'filter',            mg.filter_modifier,
      'shatter',           mg.shatter_modifier,
      'charge_rate',       mg.charge_rate_modifier,
      'instability',       mg.instability_modifier,
      'window_size',       mg.window_size_modifier,
      'catastrophic_rate', mg.catastrophic_rate_modifier
    ),
    'stats', mg.stats,
    'uex_id',                el.uex_id,
    'uex_uuid',              el.uex_uuid,
    'uex_slug',              el.uex_slug,
    'uex_link_match',        el.match_field,
    'uex_category_id',       mg.uex_category_id,
    'uex_category_name',     mg.uex_category_name,
    'uex_category_section',  mg.uex_category_section,
    'sold_at', COALESCE(sd.sold_at, '[]'::jsonb),
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(mg.name, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(mg.manufacturer, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(mg.category, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM datap4k_mining_gear_norm mg
LEFT JOIN datap4k_entity_links el ON el.id = mg.entity_link_id
LEFT JOIN shop_data sd ON sd.item_uex_id = el.uex_id
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc ON esc.entity_type = 'mining_gear' AND esc.datap4k_slug = mg.slug
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
